refnamediv.refpurpose: Convert a geometric ROI to a binary mask.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: mask = imroi2mask(roi, [rows cols]) mask = imroi2mask(roi, [rows cols], shape)

listitem.para: ROI coordinates. Rectangles and ellipses use [x y width height]; polygons use N-by-2 [x y] points.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Creates rectangle, ellipse, or polygon masks. Coordinates use the upper-left image origin.

refsection.title: Examples
